title: Silktouchless Campfires
description: Allows the player to break campfires and soul campfires without the need for silktouch.
body:
# Silktouchless Campfires
Silktouchless Campfires is a Minecraft datapack which allows the player to break campfires without the need for the silktouch enchantment.

## Details
Modifies the loot table for the Campfires to allow them to drop without the need for the Silk Touch enchantment.
